ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "price" REAL /* Current trading price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "volume_24h" REAL /* Trading volume over the past 24 hours */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the cryptocurrency is based */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform used for the cryptocurrency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cryptocurrency was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cryptocurrency data was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "whitepaper_url" TEXT /* URL to the whitepaper of the cryptocurrency */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the official website of the cryptocurrency */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the logo of the cryptocurrency */,
  "total_supply" REAL /* Total supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "circulating_supply" REAL /* Circulating supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "max_supply" REAL /* Maximum supply of the cryptocurrency (if applicable) */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Consensus algorithm used by the cryptocurrency */,
  "block_time" INTEGER /* Average block time in seconds */,
  "transaction_fee" REAL /* Average transaction fee for the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency ID */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the market data record */,
  "pct_1h" REAL /* Percentage change in price over the last hour */,
  "pct_24h" REAL /* Percentage change in price over the last 24 hours */,
  "pct_7d" REAL /* Percentage change in price over the last 7 days */,
  "volume_7d" REAL /* Trading volume over the past 7 days */,
  "volume_30d" REAL /* Trading volume over the past 30 days */,
  "pct_30d" REAL /* Percentage change in price over the last 30 days */,
  "high_24h" REAL /* Highest price in the last 24 hours */,
  "low_24h" REAL /* Lowest price in the last 24 hours */,
  "open_24h" REAL /* Opening price in the last 24 hours */,
  "close_24h" REAL /* Closing price in the last 24 hours */,
  "market_cap_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the cryptocurrency by market capitalization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ico_details" (
  "ico_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the ICO */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency ID */,
  "pre_ico_start" TEXT /* Start date of the pre-ICO phase */,
  "pre_ico_end" TEXT /* End date of the pre-ICO phase */,
  "ico_start" TEXT /* Start date of the ICO */,
  "ico_end" TEXT /* End date of the ICO */,
  "funding_goal" REAL /* Funding goal for the ICO */,
  "total_raised" REAL /* Total amount raised during the ICO */,
  "hard_cap" REAL /* Hard cap for the ICO */,
  "soft_cap" REAL /* Soft cap for the ICO */,
  "token_distribution" TEXT /* Details on token distribution */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the official website of the ICO */,
  "whitepaper_url" TEXT /* URL to the whitepaper of the ICO */,
  "telegram_url" TEXT /* URL to the Telegram group of the ICO */,
  "twitter_url" TEXT /* URL to the Twitter account of the ICO */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ico_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ico_details_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for programmatic access */,
  "api_secret" TEXT /* API secret for programmatic access */,
  "total_trades" INTEGER /* Total number of trades made by the user */,
  "total_volume" REAL /* Total trading volume by the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* User's biography or description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the watchlist */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency being tracked */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the watchlist entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the watchlist entry was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the cryptocurrency in the watchlist */,
  "alert_price" REAL /* Price at which the user wants to be alerted */,
  "alert_enabled" INTEGER /* Whether the alert is enabled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_history" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the trade */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency traded */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (buy/sell) */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_volume" REAL /* Volume of cryptocurrency traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the trade */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade record was last updated */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Name of the exchange where the trade was executed */,
  "trade_fee" REAL /* Fee charged for the trade */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique order ID from the exchange */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_sentiment" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment record */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency ID */,
  "compound" REAL /* Compound sentiment score */,
  "positive" REAL /* Count of positive sentiments */,
  "neutral" REAL /* Count of neutral sentiments */,
  "negative" REAL /* Count of negative sentiments */,
  "no_of_posts" INTEGER /* Total number of posts analyzed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sentiment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sentiment record was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the social media posts (e.g., Twitter, Reddit) */,
  "positive_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of positive sentiments */,
  "neutral_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of neutral sentiments */,
  "negative_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of negative sentiments */,
  "last_post_date" TEXT /* Date of the most recent post analyzed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_sentiment_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)
